commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5b1534e5b3e7797cf03d75aa78d75439998d1fd0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR skips Control UI local attachment preview-root gating while `localMediaPreviewRoots` is empty, adds grouped-render regression coverage, and adds a CHANGELOG.md entry.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +47, Docs +1. Total +60 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main initializes preview roots to `[]`, passes them into grouped rendering, and the availability helper hard-denies before the server metadata fetch. I did not run a live Control UI scenario because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should wait on contributor-provided real Control UI proof or an explicit maintainer override; automation should not repair while the proof gate is mock-only.

target.title: fix(control-ui): don't hard-deny local attachments before bootstrap roots load
target.body:
## Summary
- Skip the client-side `localMediaPreviewRoots` gate while roots are still empty (bootstrap config not yet loaded), so local `MEDIA:` attachments fall through to the authoritative `assistant-media?meta=1` server check instead of being permanently shown as \"Outside allowed folders\". Once roots are populated, behavior is unchanged.
- Mirrors the same fix to `resolveRenderableMessageImages` so local images aren't filtered out during the same bootstrap window.
- Adds a regression test in `ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts` and a CHANGELOG entry.

Closes #67915

## Testing
- `pnpm vitest run ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts` (36/36, includes 1 new)
- Reverting just the source change makes the new test fail with \"Outside allowed folders\", confirming it locks the behaviour in.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior or issue addressed: Issue #67915 reports local TTS audio rendering as \"Unavailable — Outside allowed folders\" in Control UI even when the server confirms `{\"available\": true}`. Cause is the client-side gate running before bootstrap roots populate. Patch falls through to the server check during that window.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout from this PR branch on macOS (Darwin 25.5.0) at HEAD de7a08d8b88494d219ed2361a01ef0c877ac4e1b. Vitest runs from the branch worktree against the changed UI module.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  ```
  pnpm vitest run ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts
  ```
- Evidence after fix:
  ```
   Test Files  1 passed (1)
        Tests  36 passed (36)
     Start at  15:24:13
     Duration  1.03s
  ```
- Observed result after fix: Bootstrap-window local attachments now hit `assistant-media?meta=1` and render once the server confirms availability; populated-roots blocking is unchanged; existing 35 grouped-render tests continue to pass.
- What was not tested: A live OpenClaw runtime on Linux/OpenShift was not exercised; the fix is UI-side and the regression test reproduces the exact gating bug.
target.author: beandon13
